title: Judge Won’t Stop Federal Immigration Enforcement Surge in Minnesota
title_cn: 法官不阻止明尼苏达州联邦移民执法行动激增

paragraphs.cn: 美国东部时间2026年1月31日下午12:32

paragraphs.en: A federal judge on Saturday declined to immediately halt the federal immigration enforcement surge in Minnesota, saying she lacked the authority to do so at this point.
paragraphs.cn: 一名联邦法官周六拒绝立即中止明尼苏达州的联邦移民执法行动激增，称她目前缺乏这样做的权力。

paragraphs.en: U.S. District Judge Katherine Menendez issued the ruling in response to a lawsuit filed by the state of Minnesota, which alleged the federal government used its aggressive enforcement campaign, dubbed Operation Metro Surge, to coerce changes in state policies and punish Democratic officials it disliked.
paragraphs.cn: 美国地区法官凯瑟琳·梅嫩德斯做出此裁决，以回应明尼苏达州提起的一项诉讼，该诉讼指控联邦政府利用其名为“地铁激增行动”的激进执法行动，胁迫州政府改变政策并惩罚其不喜欢的民主党官员。

paragraphs.en:

vocabulary.meaning_en: Politely refuse (an offer or invitation). (In this context: refused to do something)
vocabulary.example: A federal judge on Saturday declined to immediately halt the federal immigration enforcement surge in Minnesota, saying she lacked the authority to do so at this point.
vocabulary.example_cn: 一名联邦法官周六拒绝立即中止明尼苏达州的联邦移民执法行动激增，称她目前缺乏这样做的权力。
